member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener
member.summary: A listener that uses the audio stream to determine the number of decibels currently coming through.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default settings.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.DecibelChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the measured decibel level changes beyond a threshold.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.Decibel
member.summary: Gets the decibel value of the current audio stream.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.MeasuringIntervalInMilliseconds
member.summary: The time interval in milliseconds for which the decibel level is calculated. Value 0 means the decibel level is calculated for each sample, regardless of the size.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.BitDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit depth used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.Channels
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelListener.HandleOrderedPcmAudio(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs)
member.summary: Processes ordered PCM audio data to calculate decibel levels.
member.param: The ordered audio data to process.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener
member.summary: Interface for PCM audio listeners that can process ordered PCM audio data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener.Channels
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener.BitDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit depth used for audio processing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener.HandleOrderedPcmAudio(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs)
member.summary: Processes ordered PCM audio data.
member.param: The ordered audio data to process.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener.Clear
member.summary: Clear all data and reset values to initial state.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler
member.summary: Orders PCM audio into little endian formatted audio and broadcasts it to registered listeners Settings (SampleRate, ChannelType, BitDepth) are aligned to all listeners.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.#ctor(System.Int32,Plugin.Maui.Audio.ChannelType,Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.
The channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.
The bit depth used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.HandlerOutputMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the mode that determines how audio data is processed and broadcast to listeners.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.ConvertedAudio
member.summary: Optional audio output event raised when audio data is converted, even when not using listeners.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.
member.remarks: When changed, the new value is propagated to all registered listeners.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.Channels
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.
member.remarks: When changed, the new value is propagated to all registered listeners.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.BitDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit depth used for audio processing.
member.remarks: When changed, the new value is propagated to all registered listeners.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.Subscribe(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener)
member.summary: Registers a listener to receive audio data events.
member.param: The audio listener to register.
member.remarks: The listener's settings will be aligned with the handler's current settings.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.Unsubscribe(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IPcmAudioListener)
member.summary: Unregisters a listener from receiving audio data events.
member.param: The audio listener to unregister.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.Clear
member.summary: Clears all data and resets values in all registered listeners.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.HandlePcmAudio(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Processes incoming PCM audio data and converts it for listeners.
member.param: The raw PCM audio data to process.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHandler.BroadcastAudio(System.Int32[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Broadcasts audio data to all registered listeners and raises the ConvertedAudio event.
member.param: The audio data converted to little-endian formatted integers.
The original raw audio data bytes.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers
member.summary: Provides utility methods for working with PCM audio data.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.RmsToDecibel(System.Double)
member.summary: RMS to decibel value (negative decibel value, also named dBFS)
member.param: The RMS value to convert to decibel.
member.returns: The given RMS value converted to the equivalent decibel value.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.DecibelToAbsoluteRms(System.Double)
member.summary: Decibel to (positive) RMS value.
member.param: Negative decibel value (also named dBFS).
member.returns: RMS (always positive; sign information not preserved)

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.CalculateRms(System.Int32[],Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth)
member.summary: Calculate RMS (Root Mean Square) for each audio sample
member.returns: Calculated RMS values

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.ConvertToSamplesPerChannel(System.Int32[],Plugin.Maui.Audio.ChannelType)
member.summary: Convert Samples to Samples per channel
member.returns: Array with the amount of channels, each containing its samples

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.ConvertRawPcmAudioBytesToOrderedAudioSamples(System.Byte[],Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth)
member.summary: Convert raw PCM audio bytes to ordered audio samples.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.PcmAudioHelpers.ConvertOrderedAudioSamplesToRawPcmAudioBytes(System.Int32[],Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth)
member.summary: Convert ordered audio samples to raw PCM audio bytes.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.AudioHandlerOutputMode
member.summary: Specifies how audio data should be processed and broadcast to listeners.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.AudioHandlerOutputMode.Sample
member.summary: Conversion is done per sample

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.AudioHandlerOutputMode.ChannelPair
member.summary: Conversion is done per sample channel pair

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.AudioHandlerOutputMode.Block
member.summary: Conversion is done for complete block

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for when the decibel level changes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelChangedEventArgs.Decibel
member.summary: Gets the current decibel level.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.DecibelChangedEventArgs.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The current decibel level.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IsSilentChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for when the silence state changes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IsSilentChangedEventArgs.IsSilent
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the audio is currently silent.
member.remarks: Returns null when the silence state is undetermined.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.IsSilentChangedEventArgs.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The current silence state.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments containing ordered PCM audio data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs.OrderedAudio
member.summary: Little endian ordered audio data

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs.OriginalAudio
member.summary: Original (L)PCM audio data

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs.#ctor(System.Int32[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Audio data in little-endian format as integers.
Original raw audio data as bytes.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for when the RMS (Root Mean Square) value changes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsChangedEventArgs.Rms
member.summary: Gets the current RMS (Root Mean Square) value.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsChangedEventArgs.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The current RMS value.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener
member.summary: A listener that calculates the Root Mean Square (RMS) value from the incoming audio stream.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default settings.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.RmsChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the measured RMS value changes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.Rms
member.summary: Gets the current RMS (Root Mean Square) value of the audio stream.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.MeasuringIntervalInMilliseconds
member.summary: The time interval in milliseconds for which the rms level is calculated. Value 0 means the rms level is calculated for each sample, regardless of the size.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.BitDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit depth used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.Channels
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.HandleOrderedPcmAudio(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs)
member.summary: Processes ordered PCM audio data to calculate RMS values.
member.param: The ordered audio data to process.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.RmsListener.Clear
member.summary: Clears all data and resets values to their initial state.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener
member.summary: A listener that detects silence in an audio stream based on configurable thresholds.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default settings.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate in Hz used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.Channels
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel type (mono or stereo) used for audio processing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.BitDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit depth used for audio processing.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.IsSilentChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the silence state changes.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.IsSilent
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the audio stream is currently silent.
member.remarks: Returns null when the silence state is undetermined.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.MinimalSilenceTimespanInMilliseconds
member.summary: Minimal time it has to be silent to be considered as silence.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.SilenceThresholdInDb
member.summary: Silence threshold in decibel (dB) value (this system works with negative dB values, where lower in the negative value the softer the sound is)

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.Clear
member.summary: Clears all data and resets values to their initial state.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.SilenceListener.HandleOrderedPcmAudio(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioListeners.OrderedAudioEventArgs)
member.summary: Processes ordered PCM audio data to detect silence.
member.param: The ordered audio data to process.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioManager
member.summary: Implementation of providing the ability to create audio playback and recording instances.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioManager.Current
member.summary: Gets the current implementation of the audio manager.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer
member.summary: Represents an audio mixer managing multiple audio channels and handling spatial audio calculations.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.ChannelCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of channels managed by the AudioMixer.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Channels
member.summary: Gets a read-only list of audio channels.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.FastDecay
member.summary: Gets the fast decay factor.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.SlowDecay
member.summary: Gets the slow decay factor.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.#ctor(Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified number of channels.
member.param: The audio manager to create audio players.
The number of audio channels to manage.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Play(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Play an already prepared channel.
member.param: The index of the channel to play the sound on.
Indicates whether the audio should loop.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Play(System.Int32,Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioSource,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Plays the specified audio clip on the given channel.
member.param: The index of the channel to play the sound on.
The audio clip to play.
Indicates whether the audio should loop.
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.
Thrown if the audio clip is null.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Stop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Stops playback on the specified channel.
member.param: The index of the channel to stop.
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.StopAll
member.summary: Pauses playback on all channels.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.PauseAll
member.summary: Pauses playback on all channels.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.ResumeAll
member.summary: Resumes playback on all channels from unchanged positions.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.PlayAll
member.summary: Starts playback on all channels from zero.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.SetSource(System.Int32,Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioSource)
member.summary: Sets the audio source for the specified channel without playing it.
member.param: The index of the channel.
The audio clip to set as the source.
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.
Thrown if the audio clip is null.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.GetChannel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the audio player for the specified channel.
member.param: The index of the channel to retrieve.
member.returns: The audio player associated with the specified channel.
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.SetBalance(System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the stereo balance for the specified channel.
member.param: The index of the channel.
The balance value ranging from -1 (full left) to +1 (full right).
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.MapBalance(System.Single)
member.summary: Changes the stereo balance for all channels, might need when device is rotated. 1 means not change. Range -1 to +1.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.SetVolume(System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the volume for the specified channel.
member.param: The index of the channel.
The volume level (typically between 0.0 and 1.0).
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is invalid.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.ValidateChannelIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that the provided channel index is within the valid range.
member.param: The channel index to validate.
member.exception: Thrown if the channel index is out of range.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.PositionInSpace(System.Numerics.Vector3,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the adjusted Balance and Volume based on the 3D position relative to the listener.
member.param: The 3D position vector of the sound source.
The base volume before spatial adjustments.
The base balance before spatial adjustments.
member.returns: A tuple containing the adjusted Balance and Volume.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.GetDistanceDecay(System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates distance-based attenuation.
member.param: Distance from the listener.
member.returns: Attenuation factor.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.IsDisposed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance has been disposed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioMixer.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes all managed audio players.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer
member.summary: Provides async/await support by wrapping an .

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.Error
member.summary: Raised when an error occurred while loading media or playing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.#ctor(Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of . This is particularly useful if you want to customise the audio playback settings before playback.
member.param: An implementation to act as the underlying mechanism of playing audio.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.PlayAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begin audio playback asynchronously.
member.param: A to allow for canceling the audio playback.
member.returns: A that represents the asynchronous operation, awaiting this method will wait until the audio has finished playing before continuing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.Stop
member.summary: Stops the currently playing audio.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.OnError(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Something bad happened while loading media or playing.
member.param: Native platform error

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer that ensures unmanaged resources are freed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AsyncAudioPlayer.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.isPlaying
member.summary: Internal state machine for isPlaying. This is needed because when Reset is called, the player is not playing anymore, but in Idle state IsPlaying is not available

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.Error
member.summary: Raised when an error occurred while loading media or playing.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.PlaybackEnded
member.summary: Raised when audio playback completes successfully.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer that ensures unmanaged resources are freed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.OnError(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Something bad happened while loading media or playing.
member.param: Native platform error

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayer.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions
member.summary: Options that can be configured for an audio playback session.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions.AudioContentType
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio content type for Android. Default value: .

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions.AudioUsageKind
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio usage kind for Android. Default value: .
member.remarks:
See https://developer.android.com/reference/android/media/AudioAttributes for more information. On Android API26 and below, this is used to set the audio stream type. Where the following values are used:
-
-
-
-
-
If any other value is used, the default value of is used.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch
member.summary: A specialized stopwatch that handles audio playback timing with support for speed adjustments and start offsets.
member.param: The initial time offset to start from.
The playback speed factor.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch.#ctor(System.TimeSpan,System.Double)
member.summary: A specialized stopwatch that handles audio playback timing with support for speed adjustments and start offsets.
member.param: The initial time offset to start from.
The playback speed factor.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch.StartOffset
member.summary: Gets the initial time offset used when calculating elapsed time.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch.Restart
member.summary: Restarts the stopwatch and resets the start offset to zero.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch.ElapsedMilliseconds
member.summary: Gets the total elapsed milliseconds, adjusted by the speed factor and including the start offset.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStopwatch.ElapsedTicks
member.summary: Gets the total elapsed ticks, adjusted by the speed factor and including the start offset.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio
member.summary: Exposes common audio related properties and methods.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Duration
member.Summary: Gets the length of audio in seconds.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.CurrentPosition
member.Summary: Gets the current position of audio playback in seconds.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Volume
member.Summary: Gets or sets the playback volume 0 to 1 where 0 is no-sound and 1 is full volume.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Balance
member.Summary: Gets or sets the balance left/right: -1 is 100% left : 0% right, 1 is 100% right : 0% left, 0 is equal volume left/right.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Speed
member.summary: Gets the playback speed where 1 is normal speed. and can be used to determine the minimum and maximum value for each platform. Sets the playback speed where 1 is normal speed. and can be used to determine the minimum and maximum value for each platform.
member.remarks:
The minimum and maximum speeds that can be set here are different per platform. Setting values outside of these ranges will not throw an exception, it will clamp to the minimum or maximum value.
- Android: between 0 and 2.5. Setting the value to 0 will pause playback, playback will not be resumed when incrementing the value again.
- iOS: between 0.5 and 2.
- Windows: between 0 and 8. Setting the value to 0 will pause playback, playback will be resumed when incrementing the value again.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.MinimumSpeed
member.summary: Gets the minimum speed value that can be set for on this platform.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.MaximumSpeed
member.summary: Gets the maximum speed value that can be set for on this platform.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.CanSetSpeed
member.Summary: Gets a value indicating whether the playback speed can be changed.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.IsPlaying
member.Summary: Gets a value indicating whether the currently loaded audio file is playing.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Loop
member.Summary: Gets or sets whether the player will continuously repeat the currently playing sound.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.CanSeek
member.Summary: Gets a value indicating whether the position of the loaded audio file can be updated.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudio.Seek(System.Double)
member.Summary: Set the current playback position (in seconds).

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer
member.summary: Provides the ability to play audio.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.PlaybackEnded
member.Summary: Raised when audio playback completes successfully.

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.Error
member.summary: Raised when an error occurred while loading media or playing.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.Play
member.Summary: Begin playback or resume if paused.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.Pause
member.Summary: Pause playback if playing (does not resume).

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.Stop
member.Summary: Stop playback and set the current position to the beginning.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioPlayer.SetSource(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Change current audio source, reusing the player instance.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions
member.summary: Options that can be configured for an audio recording session.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.SampleRate
member.summary: Sample rate of the audio recording. 44,100Hz is currently the only rate that is guaranteed to work on all devices on Android, Android audio record documentation

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.Channels
member.summary: Channels of the audio recording. Mono is guaranteed to work on all devices on Android, Android audio record documentation

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.BitDepth
member.summary: Bit depth of the audio recording.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.Encoding
member.summary: Encoding type of the audio recording.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.BitRate
member.summary: Bit rate of the audio recording if using audio compression like AAC Common bit rates such as 64 kbps, 96 kbps, 128 kbps, 192 kbps, 256 kbps, or 320 kbps

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions.ThrowIfNotSupported
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the functionality will throw an exception if the configured recording options are not supported.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder
member.summary: Provides the ability to record audio.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder.CanRecordAudio
member.Summary: Gets whether the device is capable of recording audio.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder.IsRecording
member.Summary: Gets whether the recorder is currently recording audio.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder.StartAsync(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions)
member.Summary: Start recording audio to disk in a randomly generated file.
member.param: The audio recording options.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder.StartAsync(System.String,Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions)
member.Summary: Start recording audio to disk in the supplied .
member.param: The path on disk to store the recording. If options are used, read the audio stream and write your own file. The default header might not match your options.
The audio recording options.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioRecorder.StopAsync
member.Summary: Stop recording and return the instance with the recording data.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth
member.summary: Specifies the bit depth for audio processing.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth.Pcm8bit
member.summary: 8-bit PCM audio.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitDepth.Pcm16bit
member.summary: 16-bit PCM audio.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.ChannelType
member.summary: Specifies the channel configuration for audio processing.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.ChannelType.Mono
member.summary: Single channel audio.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.ChannelType.Stereo
member.summary: Dual channel audio.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding
member.summary:
iOS supports: Wav, ULaw, Alac, Flac, Aac
Windows supports: Wav, Alac, Flac, Aac
Android supports: Wav, Aac

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.Wav
member.summary: Uncompressed WAV File (PCM).

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.LinearPCM
member.summary: Uncompressed WAV File (PCM).

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.ULaw
member.summary: Telephony Compression.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.Alac
member.summary: Apple Lossless Audio Compression.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.Flac
member.summary: Free Lossless Audio Compression.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Encoding.Aac
member.summary: Lossy Compression (AAC in MP4/M4A container).

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamOptions
member.summary: Options that can be configured for an audio streaming session.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamOptions.SampleRate
member.summary: Sample rate of the audio recording. For iOS 44800 Hz is recommended, for Android 44,100Hz is currently the only rate that is guaranteed to work on all devices, Android audio record documentation

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamOptions.Channels
member.summary: Channels of the audio recording. Mono is guaranteed to work on all devices on Android, Android audio record documentation

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamOptions.BitDepth
member.summary: Bit depth of the audio recording.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer
member.summary: Provides the ability to stream audio.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.CanStreamAudio
member.Summary: Gets whether the device is capable of streaming audio.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.IsStreaming
member.Summary: Gets whether the streamer is currently streaming audio.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio streaming options. Android: 44100 Hz is recommended (supported: 8000, 16000 and 44100 Hz) iOS: 48000 Hz is recommended Windows: only BitDepth.Pcm16bit is supported

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.StartAsync
member.Summary: Start streaming audio to .

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.StopAsync
member.Summary: Stop streaming

member.name: E:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioStreamer.OnAudioCaptured
member.summary: Captured linear PCM audio (raw WAV audio)

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments containing audio stream data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamEventArgs.Audio
member.summary: Gets the audio data as a byte array.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamEventArgs.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The audio data as a byte array.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BaseOptions
member.summary: Base class for all audio operation option classes in the library.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.EmptyAudioSource
member.summary: An implementation that returns an empty audio stream.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.EmptyAudioSource.GetAudioStream
member.summary: Gets an empty audio stream.
member.returns: A null stream representing empty audio content.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToLoadAudioException
member.summary: When the audio fails to load this exception is thrown with details about the cause.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToLoadAudioException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this exception.
member.param: Message which describes the cause of the exception.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToLoadAudioException.Throw(System.String)
member.summary: Triggers a throw of this exception.
member.param: Message which describes the cause of the exception.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToStartRecordingException
member.summary: When the recording fails to start this exception is thrown with details about the cause.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToStartRecordingException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this exception.
member.param: Message which describes the cause of the exception.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FailedToStartRecordingException.Throw(System.String)
member.summary: Triggers a throw of this exception.
member.param: Message which describes the cause of the exception.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FileAudioSource
member.summary: A file based implementation.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FileAudioSource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The path to the audio file.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FileAudioSource.GetFilePath
member.summary: Gets the file path of this audio source.
member.returns: The file path of the audio source.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.FileAudioSource.GetAudioStream
member.summary: Provides a to allow for the playback of the audio contents.
member.returns: A with the contents of the audio file, or a null stream if the file doesn't exist.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager
member.summary: Provides the ability to create audio playback and recording instances.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.DefaultPlayerOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the default options to use when creating a new .

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.DefaultRecorderOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the default options to use when creating a new .

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.DefaultStreamerOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the default options to use when creating a new .

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreatePlayer(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new with with an empty source.
member.param: Options to configure the audio player behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new with an empty source.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreatePlayer(System.IO.Stream,Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new with the supplied ready to play.
member.param: The containing the audio to play.
Options to configure the audio player behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new with the supplied ready to play.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreatePlayer(System.String,Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new with the supplied ready to play.
member.param: The name of the file containing the audio to play.
Options to configure the audio player behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new with the supplied ready to play.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreateAsyncPlayer(System.IO.Stream,Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new AsyncAudioPlayer with the supplied audioStream ready to play audio using async/await.
member.param: The Stream containing the audio to play.
Options to configure the audio player behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new AsyncAudioPlayer with the supplied audioStream ready to play.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreateAsyncPlayer(System.String,Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new AsyncAudioPlayer with the supplied fileName ready to play audio using async/await.
member.param: The name of the file containing the audio to play.
Options to configure the audio player behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new AsyncAudioPlayer with the supplied fileName ready to play.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreateRecorder(Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new ready to begin recording audio from the current device.
member.param: Options to configure the audio recorder behavior, or null to use the default options.
member.returns: A new ready to begin recording.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioManager.CreateStreamer
member.summary: Creates a new ready to begin streaming audio from the current device.
member.returns: A new ready to begin streaming.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioSource
member.summary: Definition of a source of audio.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.IAudioSource.GetAudioStream
member.summary: Provides a to allow for the playback of the audio contents.
member.returns: A with the contents of the audio to play.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.MauiAppBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Plugin.Maui.Audio services with the MAUI dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.MauiAppBuilderExtensions.AddAudio(Microsoft.Maui.Hosting.MauiAppBuilder,System.Action{Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioPlayerOptions},System.Action{Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioRecorderOptions},System.Action{Plugin.Maui.Audio.AudioStreamOptions})
member.summary: Adds the as a singleton to the dependency injection container and provides the ability to configure the shared options for both audio playback and recording.
member.param: The to register the package with.
Configures options for streaming much alike the playback and recording options.
member.returns: The supplied in order to allow for chaining of method calls.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitsPerSample
member.summary: Enumeration for supported bits per sample in PCM audio.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitsPerSample.Bit8
member.summary: 8-bit sample depth.

member.name: F:Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitsPerSample.Bit16
member.summary: 16-bit sample depth.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource
member.summary: WAV audio clip created from raw PCM sound data without header. The property provides the complete WAV file with header, usable inside a player. Supports both 8-bit and 16-bit PCM audio.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitsPerSample)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with 8-bit samples.
member.param: Raw PCM sound data as a span of bytes.
Sample rate in Hz (e.g., 44100).
Number of audio channels (e.g., 1 for mono, 2 for stereo).
Bits per sample (e.g., 8 or 16).

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,Plugin.Maui.Audio.BitsPerSample)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with specified bits per sample.
member.param: Raw PCM sound data as a byte array.
Sample rate in Hz (e.g., 44100).
Number of audio channels (e.g., 1 for mono, 2 for stereo).
Bits per sample (e.g., 8 or 16).

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource.GetAudioStream
member.summary: Gets a stream providing access to the audio data with WAV header.
member.returns: A memory stream containing the complete WAV file data.

member.name: P:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource.Bytes
member.summary: Gets the complete WAV file data, including the header.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.RawAudioSource.BuildWavFile
member.summary: Constructs the WAV file by prepending the appropriate header to the raw PCM data.
member.returns: Byte array containing the complete WAV file.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.TaskExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for Task-related operations.

member.name: M:Plugin.Maui.Audio.TaskExtensions.WhenCanceled(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Provides a mechanism to await until the supplied has been cancelled.
member.param: The to await.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Plugin.Maui.Audio.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
